effects_provenance.raw: Zushi THCA Flower 28g / Essential Strain Profile Zushi THCA Flower is a unique hybrid bred from the flavorful combination of Zkittlez and Kush Mints . The cultivar captures attention with vibrant candy sweetness accented by refreshing minty notes, subtle earthiness, and delicate citrus undertones — producing dense, colorful buds with the kind of bag appeal that telegraphs flavor character. Effects Zushi delivers a balanced experience that pairs uplifting cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of refreshing character that distinguishes this Zkittlez-mints cross. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: vibrant candy sweetness up front, with cool minty notes through the middle and a subtle earthy-citrus finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably refreshing. The terpene profile reads candy-mint-and-citrus — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Zushi harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Zushi THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Zushi THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Its buds are dense, frosty, and built for those who want bold flavor and smooth effects in every hit. Ideal for both creative sessions and laid-back evenings, Biscotti Trop delivers a euphoric mental lift with a soothing body calm. As a triploid strain, it stands out in both potency and finish. A smoother smoke, bold flavors, and elevated THCa levels. At Hemp Hop, we bring you the best in next-gen genetics, always curated with care. Great for daytime or early evening use, it keeps the mind light while easing the body into a relaxed, feel-good state. The result is a structurally premium bud: dense, dark, glassy with trichomes, and visually closer to a top-shelf cookie cut than a typical fruit hybrid. A potent profile geared toward experienced users who want depth without blowing past their tolerance. Effects Carbon Fiber lands on the heavier end of hybrid. The onset is fast and noticeably cerebral — thoughtful, slightly introspective — before settling into a deeply relaxed body baseline. Best paired with downtime, a meal, or a quiet evening rather than tasks that require sharp focus. A classic experienced-smoker hybrid. Flavor & Aroma Layered and complex on the palate: earthy and slightly peppery up front, with sweet ripe berries from the Grape Pie parent and a baked, creamy Biscotti backbone on the exhale. "9644979781973", "name": "Carbon Fiber THCA Flower","image": "https://litfarms.com/cdn/shop/files/thca-carbon-fiber-0432_1.png?v=1760707190","description": "Strain Profile Carbon Fiber THCA Flower is a three-way hybrid bred from Grape Pie, Biscotti, and Cookies and Cream. The result is a structurally premium bud: dense, dark, glassy with trichomes, and visually closer to a top-shelf cookie cut than a typical fruit hybrid. A potent profile geared toward experienced users who want depth without blowing past their tolerance. Effects Carbon Fiber lands on the heavier end of hybrid. The onset is fast and noticeably cerebral — thoughtful, slightly introspective — before settling into a deeply relaxed body baseline. Best paired with downtime, a meal, or a quiet evening rather than tasks that require sharp focus. A classic experienced-smoker hybrid. Flavor \u0026amp;amp; Aroma Layered and complex on the palate: earthy and slightly peppery up front, with sweet ripe berries from the Grape Pie parent and a baked, creamy Biscotti backbone on the exhale. Smoke carries a subtle chemical edge that pulls everything together. The terpene profile reads dessert-meets-gas — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Carbon Fiber harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Carbon Fiber THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis (PDF) for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Carbon Fiber THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. effects_provenance.raw: Hi-Octane THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Hi-Octane THCA Flower is a powerhouse indica-dominant hybrid known for its bold aroma and heavy-hitting effects. The cultivar produces dense, structurally premium buds with a rich layered aromatic profile — pungent diesel and earthy pine mingling with sweet citrus and a hint of skunk. Effects Hi-Octane delivers a robust, indica-leaning experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with deep body relaxation. The high lands fast and lasts — suitable for users with established tolerance who want flavor character paired with serious depth. Best paired with downtime or evening use. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: gassy fuel up front, with sweet citrus through the middle and a smooth pine-skunk finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and unmistakably gas-rich. The terpene profile reads diesel-pine-and-citrus — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Hi-Octane harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Hi-Octane THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Hi-Octane THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Citrus Gas indica Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Grapes and Cream THCA Flower Essential / 28g (Smalls) Strain Profile Grapes and Cream THCA Flower is a hybrid with a dessert-forward profile commonly described as sweet grape, vanilla cream, floral spice, and a light earthy finish. Its fruit-and-cream character suits shoppers comparing grape-flavored and dessert-style THCA flower strains. Effects Grapes and Cream is commonly described as pairing a brighter cerebral feel with comfortable body relaxation. Customers may choose this balanced hybrid for social, late-afternoon, or evening sessions. Effects vary by person, serving size, and tolerance. Flavor & Aroma The aroma and flavor are commonly described as ripe grape and grape candy layered with vanilla cream, subtle floral spice, and light earth. The combination gives this strain a sweet profile with a softer, rounded finish. Lab Tested — View the COA View the Grapes and Cream THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for the available laboratory report. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Must be 21+ to purchase. Availability and shipping restrictions vary by jurisdiction. This product may cause a positive drug test. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. effects_provenance.raw: Blue Andies THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Blue Andies THCA Flower is a balanced hybrid that pairs sweet blueberry character with cool minty cream notes — reminiscent of the namesake mint candy. The cultivar produces dense, deeply colored buds with the kind of layered aromatic profile that combines fruit-forward sweetness with refreshing herbal depth. Effects Blue Andies delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of bright character that distinguishes berry-mint hybrids. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet blueberry up front, with cool mint through the middle and a creamy vanilla finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably refreshing. The terpene profile reads berry-and-mint — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Blue Andies harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Blue Andies THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Blue Andies THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Blueberry hybrid Mint Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

Download the Blue Andies THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Blue Andies THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. effects_provenance.raw: Mochi Punch THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Mochi Punch THCa Flower Strain Mochi Punch THCa Flower is a flavorful indica-leaning hybrid that blends dessert-like sweetness with full-body calm. Bred from Sunset Sherbet and Girl Scout Cookies, this strain is a close relative of the iconic Mochi and delivers a creamy, berry-filled punch with deeply relaxing effects. Perfect for end-of-day sessions, Mochi Punch brings the kind of soothing body high that melts stress and lifts the mind without heavy sedation. Shop indoor-grown Mochi Punch THCa Flower now at Hemp Hop. Mochi Punch Strain Highlights Type : Slightly Indica Dominant Hybrid (60% Indica / 40% Sativa) Parent Strains : Sunset Sherbet × Girl Scout Cookies Flavors : Creamy fruit, sweet berries, herbal spice Aroma : Sweet and fruity with pungent herbal notes Effects : Euphoric, creative, calm, deeply relaxing THCa : 26.07% What is Mochi Punch Strain Mochi Punch is the dessert strain for anyone chasing full-spectrum effects and bold flavor. It opens with a smooth inhale filled with sweet fruit and creamy berry notes, followed by a subtle herbal spice on the exhale. The high kicks off with a strong mental shift, clearing negative thoughts and replacing them with creative energy and calm. Soon after, the body begins to relax into a heavy stillness, perfect for winding down and letting go. effects_provenance.raw: Gush Mintz THCA Flower Essential / 28g (Smalls) Strain Profile Gush Mintz THCA Flower is a potent indica-dominant hybrid developed by Purple City Genetics in the Bay Area, crossing Kush Mints with F1 Durb and Gushers . The lineage stack delivers compact, deep-green and purple buds with generous trichome coverage and the pungent, sweet-pine aromatic profile that distinguishes this cultivar from typical mint hybrids. Effects Gush Mintz delivers a deeply relaxing experience anchored by full-body ease and warm cerebral euphoria. Onset is steady and the high lasts — suitable for evening use, post-work decompression, or any moment that benefits from real wind-down. A cultivar that earns its top-shelf reputation among indica fans. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: pungent sweetness up front, with cool minty pine through the middle and a grounding earthy finish on the exhale. Smoke is full, layered, and richly textured. The terpene profile reads mint-and-pine with sweet depth — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Gush Mintz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Gush Mintz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Gush Mintz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. indica Mint Pine Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Biscotti THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Biscotti THCA Flower is a potent indica-dominant hybrid often credited to Gelato 25 × Sour Florida OG (with some sources citing Motorbreath × Gelato 41 ). Either way, the cultivar is a modern flavor cornerstone — dense buds, deep coloring, generous trichome coverage, and a sweet cookie-like aromatic profile that rewards every step from the jar to the exhale. Effects Biscotti delivers a sneaky cerebral journey that builds gradually before settling into a relaxed, inspired, body-buzzing baseline. The high doesn't announce itself loudly — it sneaks up — making this a cultivar to dose with respect, especially for users with low tolerance. Best paired with downtime or evening use. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet cookie-cream up front, with layered fuel undertones through the middle and a warm dessert finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and richly textured. The terpene profile reads cookie-and-gas with sweet depth — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Biscotti harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Biscotti THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Biscotti THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. 🥚 Cookie Cream indica Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

× Sour Florida OG (with some sources citing Motorbreath × Gelato 41). Either way, the cultivar is a modern flavor cornerstone — dense buds, deep coloring, generous trichome coverage, and a sweet cookie-like aromatic profile that rewards every step from the jar to the exhale. Effects Biscotti delivers a sneaky cerebral journey that builds gradually before settling into a relaxed, inspired, body-buzzing baseline. The high doesn\u0026#39;t announce itself loudly — it sneaks up — making this a cultivar to dose with respect, especially for users with low tolerance. Best paired with downtime or evening use. Flavor \u0026amp;amp; Aroma On the palate: sweet cookie-cream up front, with layered fuel undertones through the middle and a warm dessert finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and richly textured. The terpene profile reads cookie-and-gas with sweet depth — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Biscotti harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Biscotti THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Biscotti THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. effects_provenance.raw: Black Cherry Gelato THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Black Cherry Gelato THCa Flower Strain? Black Cherry Gelato THCa Flower Strain is a slightly indica-dominant hybrid strain (60% indica/40% sativa), crafted through the expert crossing of Black Cherry Funk and Acai strains. This strain stands out for its superb flavor profile and deeply relaxing effects, making it a favorite among indica enthusiasts who also cherish a great taste. Black Cherry Gelato is distinguished by its sweet, fruity cherry berry flavor, enriched with a subtle skunky herbal touch, providing a delightful sensory experience. The buds are known for their dense structure and a striking appearance with a sweet aroma that intensifies upon combustion. Black Cherry Gelato Terpenes The terpene profile of Black Cherry Gelato is rich and effective, led by limonene, caryophyllene, and humulene. Limonene offers a refreshing citrus note that brightens the sweet and fruity flavors, contributing to the strain's mood-elevating properties. Caryophyllene adds a spicy and woody undertone, enhancing the complexity of the flavor and providing stress-relieving benefits. Humulene contributes an earthy, hoppy aroma, which complements the other terpenes and adds to the overall calming effects. This synergistic combination of terpenes not only makes Black Cherry Gelato a joy to consume but also enhances its therapeutic potential. Black Cherry Gelato Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 31.89% Total Cannabinoids: 33.51% D9-THC: 0.18% Black Cherry Gelato THCA Strain Effects Black Cherry Gelato is known for inducing a profoundly relaxing experience, starting with a mild elevation in mood that gradually transitions into a deep sense of calm. The initial uplifting effect gently soothes the mind, paving the way for a serene relaxation that envelops the body. This makes Black Cherry Gelato perfect for unwinding in the evening or enjoying a laid-back weekend. The strain’s ability to ease into relaxation without overwhelming sedation makes it suitable for those looking to de-stress and enjoy a peaceful time, enhancing leisure activities or simply chilling at home. Genotype: Black Cherry Gelato (Black Cherry Funk x Acai) Phenotype: Black Cherry Gelato Hemp Flower contains less than .3% Delta 9 THC For Adult Use Only Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full THCa Hemp flower collection.
